content.summary: 把一个模糊 AI 需求拆成目标、输入、约束、验证四层，避免直接从工具或 Prompt 开始。
content.when_to_use: 用户只有一个想法，但还没有明确数据、流程、责任边界和验收指标。
framework: 目标层：用户真正要改善的结果
输入层：可用数据、样例、权限和上下文
约束层：成本、隐私、合规、人工确认点
验证层：怎样证明 AI 输出有效

en.title: Four-Layer AI Scenario Mapping
en.summary: Break a vague AI request into goal, input, constraints, and validation layers so the work does not start from a tool or prompt too early.
en.recommendation_reason: Use it to clarify ambiguous AI opportunities before choosing tools.

content.summary: 高风险 Prompt 必须声明未知处理、引用要求、人工复核点和禁止猜测范围。
principles: 无法确认时输出待核验，而不是补全细节
事实结论必须带来源或可追溯证据
把生成任务和判断任务拆开
关键决策保留人工复核
failure_signals: 跳过用户给出的限制条件

en.title: Anti-Hallucination Prompt Boundary Principles
en.summary: High-risk prompts must define unknown handling, citation requirements, human review points, and the scope where guessing is forbidden.
en.recommendation_reason: Use it as a safety frame for factual or operational prompt outputs.

content.summary: RAG 不是把文件塞进向量库，而是把可引用、可分段、可更新、可验证的知识变成检索资产。
checklist: 每段只表达一个稳定知识点
保留来源、作者、时间和适用场景
区分事实、经验、观点和模板
为过期内容设置复审周期
content.quality_metric: 命中结果能否支持用户直接采取下一步行动。

en.title: RAG Ingestion Quality Standard
en.summary: RAG is not dumping files into a vector store; it turns citable, chunked, updateable, and verifiable knowledge into retrieval assets.
en.recommendation_reason: Use it to raise retrieval quality before scaling a knowledge base.

title: AI 工作流 ROI 评估模型

content.summary: 用节省时间、质量提升、风险降低、复用频次四个维度评估 AI 工作流是否值得产品化。
content.formula: ROI = time_saved + quality_gain + risk_reduction + reuse_frequency - operating_cost

en.title: AI Workflow ROI Evaluation Model
en.summary: Evaluate whether an AI workflow deserves productization through time saved, quality gain, risk reduction, and reuse frequency.
en.recommendation_reason: Use it to decide which workflows should become reusable assets.

content.summary: 验证信号不能只看数量，要同时考虑验证者信誉、证据强度、场景相似度和时间衰减。
content.risk: 高热度但低证据的内容不能直接合并为公共标准。

en.title: Community Validation Trust Model
en.summary: Validation signal quality depends on validator reputation, evidence strength, scenario similarity, and time decay, not just volume.
en.recommendation_reason: Use it to keep popular but weakly evidenced practices from becoming standards too early.

title: 人机协作 SOP 设计原则

content.summary: 好的 AI SOP 明确人负责目标和判断，AI 负责生成、归纳、检索和备选方案。
roles: 人：定义目标、确认风险、决定采用
AI：生成初稿、提取结构、补全候选、执行检索
content.boundary: 越靠近法律、财务、医疗和品牌承诺，越需要人工复核。

en.title: Human-AI SOP Design Principles
en.summary: A strong AI SOP keeps people accountable for goals and judgment while AI handles generation, summarization, retrieval, and options.
en.recommendation_reason: Use it to define clear responsibility boundaries in AI-assisted workflows.

content.summary: 一次查询同时调度知识解释、工具路径和案例证据，输出可执行建议。
content.output: 认知解释 + 工具路线 + 案例证据 + 风险提示

en.title: Cross-Vault RAG Dispatch Template
en.summary: Dispatch one query across knowledge explanations, tool routes, and case evidence to produce executable guidance.
en.recommendation_reason: Use it as the minimum contract for the personalized dispatch engine.

title: Prompt 到 SOP 转换工作流

content.summary: 把一次有效 Prompt 变成团队可复用 SOP，而不是停留在个人技巧。
steps: 记录原始 Prompt 和输出
标注适用条件和失败条件
content.template: 目标 / 输入 / 步骤 / 质量标准 / 人工复核 / 更新记录

en.title: Prompt-to-SOP Conversion Workflow
en.summary: Turn an effective prompt into a reusable team SOP instead of leaving it as an individual trick.
en.recommendation_reason: Use it to convert proven prompts into repeatable operating standards.

title: AI 资料清洗入库流程

content.summary: 把 PDF、网页、聊天记录和表格清洗成可检索、可引用、可更新的知识片段。
content.quality_gate: 随机抽 10 个真实问题，检查检索结果是否能支持回答。

en.title: AI Material Cleaning and Ingestion Flow
en.summary: Clean PDFs, web pages, chat logs, and spreadsheets into searchable, citable, and updateable knowledge chunks.
en.recommendation_reason: Use it before building retrieval over messy team materials.

content.summary: 把一次 AI 实践复盘成案例库资产，保留 Before/After、证据和可复用边界。
content.evidence: 至少包含一个可验证指标，例如时间、成本、准确率、转化率或满意度。

en.title: Case Retrospective Template
en.summary: Turn one AI practice into a case asset by preserving before/after state, evidence, and reuse boundaries.
en.recommendation_reason: Use it to make successful practices understandable and reusable.

content.summary: 提交社区验证前，用事实性、逻辑性、完整性、可复用性四项检查内容。
content.review_output: approve / needs_revision / reject + 证据说明

en.title: Validation Review Checklist
en.summary: Before submitting community validation, check factuality, logic, completeness, and reusability.
en.recommendation_reason: Use it to keep validation signals concrete and comparable.

title: 客服 FAQ 自动化流程

content.summary: 把高频客服问题聚类，生成标准回复、升级规则和案例库记录。

en.title: Support FAQ Automation Flow
en.summary: Cluster frequent support questions, generate standard replies, define escalation rules, and create case records.
en.recommendation_reason: Use it to turn repetitive support work into an automation-ready asset.

title: 跨境营销本地化 SOP 案例

content.summary: 团队用本地化判断框架和翻译评审 Agent，把广告脚本生产从 2 天缩短到 4 小时。
content.before: 人工翻译后再由市场团队多轮修改，风格不稳定。
content.after: AI 先生成区域版本，Agent 做风险标注，人工只复核高风险表达。
evidence: 本地化禁用词命中率下降

en.title: Cross-Border Localization SOP Case
en.summary: A team used localization decision frames and translation-review agents to cut ad script production from two days to four hours.
en.recommendation_reason: Use it as evidence for combining judgment frames with review agents.

title: 教师 AI 助教反馈案例

content.summary: 培训机构把课堂记录、作业和学生画像输入 AI，自动生成课后反馈初稿。
content.before: 老师每次课后手动整理反馈，平均 90 分钟。
content.after: AI 生成结构化反馈，老师复核和补充个性化建议，平均 20 分钟。

en.title: AI Teaching Assistant Feedback Case
en.summary: A training company used class records, assignments, and learner profiles to generate first drafts of after-class feedback.
en.recommendation_reason: Use it to see where teachers should keep review control while AI reduces repetitive drafting.

title: 客服 FAQ 自动化案例

content.summary: 客服团队把 3 个月工单聚类为 FAQ 知识库，并建立人工升级边界。
content.before: 新人客服重复搜索历史答案，回复质量依赖个人经验。
content.after: AI 推荐标准回复和相似案例，复杂问题自动升级给人工。
evidence: 投诉类问题仍由人工确认

en.title: Support FAQ Automation Case
en.summary: A support team clustered three months of tickets into an FAQ knowledge base and defined human escalation boundaries.
en.recommendation_reason: Use it as evidence for automation coverage with clear escalation rules.

title: 独立开发 PRD 到代码骨架案例

content.summary: 独立开发者用 AI 把 PRD 转成领域模型、接口契约和测试清单，再进入人工编码。
content.before: 需求直接写代码，接口边界频繁返工。
content.after: 先生成模型和 OpenAPI 草案，人工确认后再开发。

en.title: Indie Developer PRD-to-Code Skeleton Case
en.summary: An indie developer used AI to turn a PRD into domain models, API contracts, and test checklists before human coding.
en.recommendation_reason: Use it to structure early product engineering without skipping review.

title: 财报风险因子抽取案例

content.summary: 金融分析师用长文本 RAG 提取 10-K 风险因子，并对比年份变化。
content.before: 人工阅读数百页 PDF，容易漏掉细微措辞变化。
content.after: AI 先抽取风险段落和引用页码，分析师复核高影响变化。
evidence: 最终判断仍由分析师负责

en.title: Financial Report Risk Factor Extraction Case
en.summary: A financial analyst used long-context RAG to extract 10-K risk factors and compare changes across years.
en.recommendation_reason: Use it as a case for citable retrieval in regulated analysis work.

content.summary: 运营团队把分散在文档、聊天和表格里的经验迁移成可检索的三库资产。
content.before: 新人靠问人和翻聊天记录学习流程。
content.after: 知识解释、工具流程和真实案例分库存放，由搜索和调度统一访问。
evidence: 旧经验通过复审机制降权

en.title: Team Knowledge Base Migration Case
en.summary: An operations team migrated scattered experience from documents, chats, and spreadsheets into searchable three-vault assets.
en.recommendation_reason: Use it as a practical migration path from scattered knowledge to shared assets.
